name: Gurdwara Pathar Sahib
description: A beautiful Gurdwara built in 1517 to commemorate the visit of Guru Nanak Dev to the Ladakh region. It houses a large rock believed to have been thrown at him by a demon.
history: Highly revered by both Sikhs and local Tibetan Buddhists who consider Guru Nanak as Guru Gompka Maharaj.
famousFor: Sacred rock with an imprint, Langar (community meal), spiritual peace.
